description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk with the leather strips and stitch detailing are perfect for formal and casual outfits. The simple design makes for comfortable everyday wear. Team these with dresses, jeans and tops. Upper Synthetic leather upper covering the forefoot and midfoot Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Synthetic leather heel cup with cut outs on the sides for added structure Elasticated loop from the heel cup to the midfoot straps for snug Fit Cushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on forefoot Waffle patterned lugs on the heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
